headline: Jeremy Monga
body: 🚨 Arsenal now in club-to-club contact with Leicester City over deal for Jeremy Monga. No agreement yet but direct talks; all sides handling respectfully due to 16yo age. Many keen but only wanted AFC - plan to pay fair fee & avoid tribunal TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7205050… Link Arsenal in club-to-club contact with Leicester over Jeremy Monga deal Monga has been targeted by a host of leading teams but only wanted Arsenal. nytimes.com
raw_text:
🚨 Arsenal now in club-to-club contact with Leicester City over deal for Jeremy Monga. No agreement yet but direct talks; all sides handling respectfully due to 16yo age. Many keen but only wanted #AFC - plan to pay fair fee & avoid tribunal @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7205050…

Link

Monga has been targeted by a host of leading teams but only wanted Arsenal.
